violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw beef stored above ready to eat items in refrigerator. Raw chicken stored with ready to eat items in prep table cooler.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Hot dog roller placed in lobby/clubhouse area not provided with cover/lid.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items not provided with date marking.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Invert spoons stored on prep table cooler. Handles up. Cover containers of utensils or move refuse can from being adjacent to container to protect items from contamination.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert forks at hot dog roller so handles are up. Store boxes/sleeves of food storage containers off floor in lower level storage area.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Lower level storage area fitted with carpet. Refrigeration storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Carpet dirty/stained in lower level storage area.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store paint and cleaning chemicals away from single use items in lower level storage area.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store containers of food items off floor in walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare wood shelving in basement storage area. Surface not sealed.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Grease build-up around fryer needs cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Carpet installed on lower level where refrigeration units and freezers are stored.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
